transcript: [music and sound effects only, no speech]
on_screen_text: 3000 English Coaching class రూపాయలు పనికిరాకుండా పోయినప్పుడు [When 3000 rupees spent on English coaching classes go to waste] MySivi AIతో ₹1కే English నేర్చుకోవడం మొదలుపెట్టాక [After starting to learn English with MySivi AI for just ₹1]
summary: A split-screen meme ad contrasting the regret of wasting ₹3000 on traditional English coaching with the happiness of learning English for just ₹1 using MySivi AI. It features popular Telugu comedy scenes of actor Brahmanandam to drive the message.
